data.title: AB to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on April 28, 2026
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee today, AllianceBernstein L.P. and AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. revealed that their financial and operating results for the First Quarter of 2026 will be disclosed to the public before the market opens on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The company's stock, listed as AB on the New York Stock Exchange, will be closely watched by investors to gauge its performance. Management is set to hold a discussion following the release, providing insights into the numbers and operations of the firm.
Nanox will release Q4 2025 financial results on April 20, 2026.

data.title: TEN Ltd. Declares Dividend on its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares
data.description: In Athens, Greece on April 6, 2026, TEN Ltd. (NYSE: TEN), a prominent crude, product, and LNG tanker operator, revealed that their Board of Directors approved the standard quarterly cash dividend of around $0.59375 per share for its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares, known as the "Series F Preferred Shares" on NYSE as TENPRF.

data.title: Cisco Appoints Pete Shimer to its Board of Directors
data.description: Cisco has recently announced the appointment of Pete Shimer to its board of directors. Shimer, a former Deloitte executive and accomplished board leader, joins the company effective immediately. With over 40 years of executive experience and a strong background in C-suite positions, Shimer will serve on the Board's Audit Committee. This strategic move further strengthens Cisco's leadership team and brings valuable expertise to the company as it continues to grow.
Immuneering to speak at the 25th Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference.

data.title: Tripadvisor Repays Convertible Senior Notes
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in Needham, Massachusetts, Tripadvisor, Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIP) disclosed that they have fully repaid their 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes due in 2026 ("2026 Senior Notes"). This repayment amount totaled $345.4 million, which included both the principal sum and the accumulated interest. The payment was facilitated by utilizing the company's available cash reserves. It was highlighted that no holders of the notes opted for conversion to Tripadvisor stock.

data.title: ThredUp to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: Oakland, California-based ThredUp, a prominent online resale platform for clothing and accessories, is set to disclose its financial performance for Q1 2026 on May 4, 2026, following the closure of U.S. markets. The company, listed as TDUP on NASDAQ and LTSE, will unveil its results and host a live webcast and conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day. This announcement signifies an eagerly anticipated update on ThredUp's performance in the first quarter of the year, providing investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's growth and financial standing.

data.title: Largest Independent Shareholder of Neuronetics, Inc., Jorey Chernett, Calls for Immediate and Comprehensive Review of Strategic Alternatives, Including Sale of TMS Business
data.description: A letter has been sent to the STIM board by Jorey Chernett, the biggest independent shareholder of Neuronetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: STIM), based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan on April 6, 2026. In the letter, it was outlined that there is a potential 5-7x upside for shareholders through the sale of TMS and standalone clinic business.
CEO James Heckman reveals NASDAQ strategy, long-term focus, capitalization structure, and lock-up plans in roundtable discussion.

data.title: PennantPark Investment Corporation Schedules Earnings Release of Second Fiscal Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: PennantPark Investment Corporation, listed on the NYSE as PNNT, disclosed that it is scheduled to release its financial results for the second fiscal quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The announcement will take place on Thursday, May 7, 2026, following the closure of the financial markets.
MOC Imbalance S&P 500: +741 mln Nasdaq 100: +559 mln Dow 30: +160 mln Mag 7: +215 mln
DMG Blockchain Solutions gets 2 MW of pre-fab data center units at Christina Lake center; reports preliminary March operations.

data.title: Analysts Cut Tesla Price Targets As Regulators Shutter Investigation
data.description: Tesla's stocks experienced a 3.5% drop on Monday following the news that analysts decreased their price targets for the company. This change came after regulatory authorities closed an investigation related to Tesla.

data.title: This Is How Much Surging Oil Prices Will Boost Inflation
data.description: There are concerning forecasts for the future, especially with two inflation reports coming this week. The surging oil prices are expected to greatly increase inflation rates.

data.title: Virtu Financial Stock Hit Record High Monday, Defying Overall Market Weakness
data.description: Virtu Financial's IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating was upgraded from 94 to 96 on Monday. Despite overall market weakness, the stock of Virtu Financial hit a record high.

data.title: Intentwise introduces "Commerce Observability"
data.description: Intentwise, a prominent provider of marketplace management technology, made an announcement on April 6, 2026, about the establishment of a new concept known as Commerce Observability. This category is described as the essential standard for contemporary marketplace commerce. According to Intentwise, the current state of marketplace commerce is hindered by an observability issue, where critical signals are dispersed and not easily monitored.

data.title: PlusAI to Host Business Update Call on April 7th, 2026
data.description: PlusAI, a prominent AI software company specializing in autonomous trucks, will be hosting a Business Update conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, April 7, 2026, in Santa Clara, Calif. The call will focus on key developments in commercial, financial, and strategic areas. Notable updates to be covered include the ongoing joint pilot project with Ryder System, Inc. and International Motors for autonomous trucks deployment. This initiative marks a significant milestone in the journey towards integrating autonomous technology into trucking operations. The conference call aims to provide stakeholders with crucial insights into PlusAI's recent progress in this regard.

data.title: In HelloNation, HVAC Expert Barbara Huether Clark Explains Humidity Trouble
data.description: In the town of Gates, a report released on April 6, 2026, discusses the reasons behind high levels of indoor moisture and emphasizes the significance of a well-functioning HVAC system in enhancing comfort and safeguarding homes. It addresses the issue homeowners face when their HVAC system successfully cools the air but struggles to regulate indoor humidity levels. HelloNation recently shared recommendations on how to tackle this problem in a published article.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Oil Pops; Bank Play Eyes Entry After This 'Trump Accounts' Move (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise in value. Netflix stock saw a strong increase on the stock market. An economic report revealed early signs of the impact of Iran on the market. The post on Investor's Business Daily titled "Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Oil Pops; Bank Play Eyes Entry After This 'Trump Accounts' Move" indicated live coverage detailing these developments.

data.title: Taylor Hougland Joins Pella Corporation as EVP & Group President, Business Units    Accomplished Executive   to Lead Pella's Portfolio Growth and   Performance
data.description: Pella Corporation, based in Pella, Iowa, disclosed on April 6, 2026, that Taylor Hougland has been appointed as the Executive Vice President & Group President of Business Units. This role became effective on the same day. Hougland will now report directly to Emily Videtto, who holds the position of President within the company.
